_comment: CCI combined valid fixture. Clean payload expected to pass all seven CCI validators and context resolver with minimal warnings.
body: 1. The Department of the Navy (DON) requires all units to comply with established correspondence standards.
2. Per reference (a), all commands must maintain accurate distribution lists.
3. The unit must report readiness status by 1400 on 15 May 2026.
4. Personnel must capitalize proper references to Sailors and Marines.
